concerns.text: Plan Phase 0 (Research & Feasibility) contains tasks P0-T01 through P0-T04 (research sources, verify statistical tests, assess compute feasibility, document dataset strategy) with no corresponding tasks in tasks.md. This leaves research feasibility work unaccounted for in the implementation plan.

Plan.md Phase 2 task T096b ('Compute checksums for data files') exists but has no corresponding task in tasks.md. While T016 and T076 cover checksums for raw and output files respectively, T096b's specific scope is not explicitly covered.

T069 implements FR-031b real-world validation but does not explicitly mandate stratification across five major domains (tech, e-commerce, finance, healthcare, SaaS) as required by FR-031b and SC-001. Task description should include this stratification requirement.

T027 implements 'exactly 10,000' synthetic summaries while FR-030 specifies 'at least 10,000'. This scope tightening is not justified in the spec and may limit flexibility for stable precision/recall estimates.
